mapper.select: SELECT id, domain_id as domainId, domain_entity_id as domainEntityId, database_name as databaseName, table_name as tableName, table_type as tableType, entity_id_name_map_table_field as entityIdNameMapTableField, description, gmt_create as gmtCreate, gmt_modifed as gmtModifed FROM domain_data_source
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO domain_data_source (domain_id, domain_entity_id, database_name, table_name, table_type, entity_id_name_map_table_field, description, gmt_create, gmt_modifed) VALUES (#{domainId}, #{domainEntityId}, #{databaseName}, #{tableName}, #{tableType}, #{entityIdNameMapTableField}, #{description}, #{gmtCreate}, #{gmtModifed})
mapper.select: SELECT id, domain_id as domainId, domain_entity_id as domainEntityId, database_name as databaseName, table_name as tableName, table_type as tableType, entity_id_name_map_table_field as entityIdNameMapTableField, description, gmt_create as gmtCreate, gmt_modifed as gmtModifed FROM domain_data_source WHERE id = #{id}

SELECT id, domain_id as domainId, domain_entity_id as domainEntityId, database_name as databaseName, table_name as tableName, table_type as tableType, entity_id_name_map_table_field as entityIdNameMapTableField, description, gmt_create as gmtCreate, gmt_modifed as gmtModifed FROM domain_data_source WHERE database_name = #{dbName} AND table_name = #{tbName}

SELECT id, domain_id as domainId, domain_entity_id as domainEntityId, database_name as databaseName, table_name as tableName, table_type as tableType, entity_id_name_map_table_field as entityIdNameMapTableField, description, gmt_create as gmtCreate, gmt_modifed as gmtModifed FROM domain_data_source WHERE domain_entity_id = #{domainEntityId}
